body:
Birth Centre Campaign — Sprint Wins, Risks, Asks

  • Win: HSE West confirmed receipt of community feedback submission.
  • Win: Campaign website now receiving 400+ unique visits/week.
  • Risk: HSE feasibility timeline may slip to Q2 2027.
  • Ask: Legal review of proposed birth centre governance model needed before next submission.
title: Weekly status

body:
Hampton's Rest — Operations Update

  • Win: All three rooms booked for October half-term week.
  • Win: Received Fáilte Ireland 4-star guest accommodation certification.
  • Risk: Boiler service overdue — schedule before November.
  • Ask: Decision needed on whether to open for Christmas week this year.
title: Quarterly plan

body:
NUIG Masters — Module 4 Progress

  • Win: Assignment submitted on time; awaiting feedback from supervisor.
  • Risk: Literature review chapter needs additional primary sources on rural postnatal staffing.
  • Ask: Confirm access to HSE West caseload data for research component.
title: Project kickoff notes

body:
HSE West Community Midwifery — Team Update

  • Win: Two new community midwives recruited to the Connemara East area.
  • Win: Day-5 visit completion rate improved to 94% this quarter.
  • Risk: Winter pressures may impact caseload cover in December.
  • Ask: Review of out-of-hours protocol required before year end.
title: Postmortem draft

body:
Campaign Site — Technical Notes

  • Win: SSL renewed, all pages serving over HTTPS.
  • Win: Petition counter now updating in real time.
  • Risk: Google Analytics double-counting under investigation.
  • Ask: Decision on whether to migrate from current CMS to Webflow needed by end of month.
title: Onboarding checklist

body:
INMO Western Branch — Conference Prep

  • Win: Abstract accepted for March 2027 presentation slot.
  • Win: Two community midwifery colleagues agreed to co-present on day-5 postnatal gaps.
  • Risk: Slide deck not yet started.
  • Ask: Confirm venue AV requirements and presentation format with INMO coordinator.
title: Vendor evaluation

body:
Galway Birth Centre — Feasibility Submission Tracker

  • Win: Evidence pack (Birthplace UK, Cochrane review, HSE strategy) compiled and formatted.
  • Risk: No response yet from HSE West Capital Projects team.
  • Ask: Request meeting with HSE West CHO to discuss submission formally.
title: Budget worksheet

body:
Community Midwifery CPD — Q1 2027 Planning

  • Win: NRP recertification booked for January.
  • Win: Perinatal mental health workshop confirmed for February.
  • Risk: EPDS training for new staff not yet scheduled.
  • Ask: Check HSE CPD funding eligibility for NUIG module costs.
title: Roadmap one-pager

body:
Hampton's Rest — Guest Experience Review

  • Win: Average TripAdvisor rating now 4.7/5 following summer season.
  • Win: New welcome hamper with local Connemara produce launched — great feedback.
  • Risk: Breakfast menu variety flagged by two guests as repetitive.
  • Ask: Introduce one vegetarian full Irish option for next season.
title: Weekly status

body:
Birth Centre Campaign — Community Outreach

  • Win: Petition reached 2,200 signatures this week.
  • Risk: Social media reach dropping — need new content for campaign site.
  • Ask: Recruit two additional volunteer community spokespeople from Connemara area.
title: Quarterly plan

body:
HSE West — Maternity Network Meeting Notes

  • Win: Collaborative postnatal protocol agreed between community and hospital teams.
  • Risk: Discharge-to-community handover documentation still inconsistent.
  • Ask: Raise at next HSE West MDT: standardise discharge checklist format.
title: Project kickoff notes

body:
Strava Running Club — Salthill Group Update

  • Win: Club membership reached 47 followers on Strava.
  • Win: Sky Road Saturday run now a regular fixture — 8–12 attendees weekly.
  • Risk: No formal route map published yet — some new members getting lost on descent.
  • Ask: Joan to publish the Sky Road loop route file to the club segment.
title: Postmortem draft

body:
hamptonsrest.ie — Website Maintenance Log

  • Win: Booking form rebuilt with client-side validation.
  • Win: Gallery switched to WebP images — load time now under 2s mobile.
  • Risk: Rooms page copy still references old pricing.
  • Ask: Update pricing page before next Airbnb sync.
title: Onboarding checklist

body:
NUIG Masters — Supervisor Meeting Notes

  • Win: Research question approved: "What factors affect day-5 postnatal visit completion in rural HSE West?"
  • Win: Literature review skeleton approved by supervisor.
  • Risk: Ethics approval application not yet submitted.
  • Ask: Submit NUIG ethics application by end of October.
title: Vendor evaluation

body:
Galway Running — Connemara Marathon Prep

  • Win: Joan completed the 12km Sky Road loop in 1:02 last weekend — new PB.
  • Win: Salthill Prom 5k group growing — now 8 regular participants.
  • Risk: No long run over 18km completed yet in this training block.
  • Ask: Plan a Clifden-to-Roundstone out-and-back for the next off-call weekend.
title: Budget worksheet
